text: Hi mija - did the new reading glasses arrive yet? Let me know if they fit alright.
Hi Mom, the reading glasses arrived and works well. Thanks for sorting it out. Call you tonight.
Reminder: family dinner on Saturday at 6pm. Looking forward to it.
We'll be over Saturday. Your mother is making tamales, so come hungry.
Coffee tomorrow at 7? Zara has a school thing later but morning is wide open.
Yes please. I'll meet you at the usual spot. I need this more than I need sleep, clearly.
Are we still on for the watercolor session Sunday at 2? I finally got new brushes.
Hi Rachel, watercolor class is this Sunday at 2pm. We're painting spring florals.
Karim and I picked a date for the engagement dinner. Can you and Mom make the 14th?
Wouldn't miss it, Nic. The 14th is ours. Tell Karim I'm already proud of him.
Hey sis, I land in Detroit Saturday around noon. Anything you want me to bring from Chicago?
Just bring yourself. I'll have the guest room ready and Mom's already counting on you for dinner.
Hi Carla, watercolor class is on as usual Tuesday at 7 at the studio. All levels welcome.
Thanks Maria, I'll be at the Tuesday painting class. The plein-air one last week was lovely.
Is there still a spot in Sunday's class? A friend of mine would love to try watercolors.
Always room for one more, Sofia. Bring her along. We start at 2, extra paper is on me.
Class potluck on Saturday. Could you bring a salad? Reply to confirm.
Happy to bring a salad to the class potluck. Count me in.
Maria, the studio room is reserved for your class Sunday 1:30 to 4. Tables are set up already.
Mija, the photos from your last painting class came out beautiful. So proud of you.
Hi mija - did the new reading glasses arrive yet? Let me know if they fit alright.

We'll be over Saturday. Your mother is making tamales, so come hungry.
Hotel block quote came back at $165 per head, includes breakfast. Locking it in unless anyone wants a different vibe.
$165 works for me. Lock it.
Sounds good. Fair warning that quote is pre-tax though so real number will be a bit higher.
Hotel invoice came in higher than the quote once tax and the resort fee landed. Final cleared per-head is $187. Sending Venmo requests to close out the delta.
I'll put $375 down for the group dinner deposit. That should cover my share plus a buffer.
Actually your share came out to $400 after we added the wine flight. Let me know if that's still ok.
Mija, I've been keeping count in the group. We have 136 confirmed from the family thread so far.
Thanks Mom. Nicole's master list has 142, so we still need to reconcile a handful with her.
Booking a flight in for the wedding. Thinking afternoon arrival around 4 PM so I have time to change before rehearsal.
Perfect, we'll plan pickup around 4:30 then.
Change of plans, cheaper flight only has an evening slot. Rebooked. Amadeus confirmation will show up in your email.
Hey Maria, no wedding stuff, just wanted to know if there's a good time to drop off the paperwork this week.
No rush, just let me know when.
You still good to cover the Saturday 2-4 PM Arts Center class on the wedding weekend? I'll drop the materials packet by Wednesday.
Yes! My travel plans changed, I'm around that weekend. Send the packet whenever.
Hey, can you look at Lakeside Kitchen's headcount ask? They keep pinging me and I'm losing track of who confirmed where.
On it. I'll get you one clean number by Thursday, plus a note on where each of the other sources drifted.
Mija, tu abuela is asking how much all this wedding stuff is running you. I told her it was your business but she keeps asking. Also, are you still not seeing anyone?
Don't forget the tres leches order for Sunday lunch.
Booking flight now, will send confirmation.
Karim's mom wants to talk seating chart.
Working on the seating now, will send draft.
Restaurant confirmed, sending deposit info.
Got it, will Venmo tonight.
Hair and makeup schedule locked in.
Perfect. What time do we need to be ready?
9 AM sharp on the day. Coffee first.
Karim's tie is going to match the hydrangeas.
Perfect. Photographer already knows.
Also the DJ swap is done, new one is way better.
Thank goodness. Send the playlist link when you can.
Rental car booked, will drive to Dad's after landing.
Even better, that saves me the airport run.
I made brownies for Sunday. Come by, mija.
Yes please. I'll bring the good tea.
Dad wants to know the ceremony start time again.
5 PM at Lakeside Kitchen. Rehearsal is the night before at 6.
